violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth found on prep table during inspection. Wet wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the ventilation system were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor in front of the ice bin was found broken. Flooring should be maintained in good repair.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring under the fryers and the wall behind the fryers were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. Back door is not tight fitting. Doors should be tight fitting to protect from weather and entrance of insects, rodents and other animals.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloths found on prep tables during inspection. Wet wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Carton of expired eggs were found in the prep table during inspection. Expired products should be discarded.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. Can opener blade was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand washing sink was not supplied with soap during inspection. Soap should be available at all times.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Hole found in the floor in front of the preparation cooler during inspection. Floor tiles also found broken or missing in the kitchen. Flooring should be maintained in good repair.
